login.title: Sign in to your account
login.accountLocked: Your account is inactive. Contact support.
login.secureMessage: Secure access to your personal space
login.emailNotVerified: Email not verified. Check your inbox or request a new link.

register.title: Create your account
register.verifyEmail: Please verify your email before signing in.
register.success: Registration successful. Check your email to verify your account.
register.passwordHint: At least 8 characters, one uppercase, one lowercase, one number, and one special character.

passwordReset.title: Reset your password
passwordReset.instruction: Enter your email address and we will send you a reset link.
passwordReset.success: If an account exists for this email, you will receive reset instructions.
passwordReset.newPasswordHint: Choose a strong password: at least 8 characters, upper and lower case, a number, and a special character.
passwordReset.invalidLink: Invalid or expired link. Request a new one from the forgot password page.
passwordReset.successRedirect: Password updated. Redirecting to sign in…
passwordReset.footerRights: © {{year}} Académie des Éleveurs. All rights reserved.
